mnemonics: Continuous Evaluation Is Like Training A Model: You need frequent checkpoints (CIE) to monitor progress, not just a single final exam (like a final model deployment) to ensure you're on the right learning path.
keyPoints: CIE provides ongoing assessment of a student's understanding throughout the module.
It helps identify knowledge gaps early, allowing for timely intervention and improved learning outcomes.
The results contribute to the final grade, reducing the pressure and weight of a single final examination.
commonMistakes: Assuming CIE grades are unimportant because the final exam has a higher weightage.
Procrastinating on CIE tasks, as they are designed to encourage consistent study habits.
Not using CIE feedback to identify and address specific areas of weakness in the subject.
